name: Certificate III in Landscape Construction
entry_requirements:
There are no formal academic prerequisites for this qualification; however, applicants must:

- Be 18 years or older
- Possess basic English communication skills
- Demonstrate capacity for outdoor manual work
- Have basic numeracy skills for measurements and calculations
- Participate in an LLN assessment prior to enrolment
- Students may also require personal protective equipment (PPE) during practical sessions.

name: Certificate IV in Plumbing and Services
entry_requirements:
This qualification is intended for individuals who:

- Have completed CPC32420 Certificate III in Plumbing or equivalent
- Hold relevant plumbing trade experience
- Possess sound communication and numeracy skills
- Undertake a Language, Literacy and Numeracy (LLN) assessment prior to enrolment
- Additional licensing or industry requirements may apply depending on the specialisation selected.

name: Certificate III in Engineering - Fabrication Trade
entry_requirements:
While there are no formal entry requirements under the training package, participants typically:

- Be employed as an apprentice or have access to a fabrication workplace
- Have basic literacy and numeracy skills
- Demonstrate mechanical aptitude and interest in engineering
Additional requirements may include:

- White Card (Construction Induction)
- PPE suitable for workshop environments
